metadata.title: Kiss On My List (Remix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:33.42] My friends wonder why I call you all of the time
[00:36.64] What can I say
[00:40.81] I don't feel the need to give such secrets away
[00:49.18] You think maybe I need help, no, I know that I'm right, alright
[00:52.67] I'm just better off not listening to friends' advice
[01:04.62] When they insist on knowing my bliss
[01:09.63] I tell them this
[01:12.62] When they want to know what the reason is
[01:16.51] I only smile when I lie, then I tell them why
[01:20.39] (Because your kiss) your kiss is on my list
[01:24.31] (Because your kiss) your kiss is on my list
[01:28.33] Because your kiss is on my list of the best things in life
[01:35.67] (Because your kiss) your kiss is on my list
[01:39.85] (Because your kiss) your kiss I can't resist
[01:43.72] (Because your kiss) is what I miss when I turn on the lights
[01:51.72] I go crazy wondering what there is to really see
[02:00.48] Did the night just take up your time, 'cause it means more to me
[02:08.59] Sometimes I forget what I'm doing, I don't forget what I want, that I want
[02:15.90] Regret what I've done, regret you, I couldn't go on
[02:22.93] But if you insist on knowing my bliss
[02:29.46] I'll tell you this
[02:31.17] If you want to know what the reason is
[02:36.19] I'll only smile when I lie, then I'll tell you why
[02:39.82] (Because your kiss) your kiss is on my list
[02:43.78] (Because your kiss) your kiss is on my list
[02:47.78] Because your kiss is on my list of the best things in life
[02:55.66] (Because your kiss) your kiss is on my list
[03:00.03] (Because your kiss) your kiss I can't resist
[03:03.23] (Because your kiss) is what I miss when I turn on the lights
[03:07.89]
